description: Account in Arabic script, seems to be private though the layout resembles official documents. "Account of the soap which arrived on the date of [...] of Muḥarram of the year [...] to the shop of Tāj al-Mulūk with Abū l-Qāsim b. Aḥmad Ibn Nufayʿ. (ثبت ما ورد من الصابون بتاريخ . . . . . . . . من المحرم سنة . . . . . . على دكان تاج الملوك مع ابو القاسم بن احمد بن نفيع). On recto the name Hibatallāh b. Ḥusayn appears in Arabic script. Around this, reused for Hebrew literary text.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בערבית. מוחזק בהספרייה הבריטית.
